zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton於1378年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋巴頓時，他的父親Sir Adam Glendonwyn23歲，母親Margaret de Wauchope24歲。他和Mary Douglas至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1437年在法國崔英德-吉洛易維爾努-素-布倫享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton was born in 1378, in Parton, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Adam Glendonwyn, was 23 and his mother, Margaret de Wauchope, was 24. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Mary Douglas. He died in 1437, in Vernou-sur-Brenne, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton est né en 1378, à Parton, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam Glendonwyn, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Wauchope, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Mary Douglas. Il est décédé en 1437, à Vernou-sur-Brenne, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton 1378 in Parton, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam Glendonwyn 23 und seine Mutter Margaret de Wauchope 24. Er hatte mit Mary Douglas mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1437 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Vernou-sur-Brenne, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Mary Douglas. Morì nel 1437, nel Vernou-sur-Brenne, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Partonが1378年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイパートンで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Glendonwynは23歳，母Margaret de Wauchopeは24歳であった。彼はMary Douglasとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1437年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーバーノウ-スル-ブレンで59歳で死去した。

ko.Parton, Kirkcudbrightshire, Dumfries and: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 파르턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton(이)가 1378년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 파르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam Glendonwyn(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Wauchope(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Mary Douglas(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1437년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 베른우-수-브렌에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton nasceu em 1378, em Parton, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Adam Glendonwyn, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Wauchope, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Mary Douglas. Ele faleceu em 1437, em Vernou-sur-Brenne, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 59 anos.

ru.Parton, Kirkcudbrightshire, Dumfries and: партон, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton родился в 1378 г. в местности партон, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Adam Glendonwyn было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Wauchope, 24. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Mary Douglas. Он умер в 1437 г. в местности вирноу-сур-бренн, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.
